tool.name: Amnesia Pass Generator
tool.hero.description: Deterministic hash-based password generator. Enter a keyword and a per-service salt — the same password is always recreated without storing it anywhere.
tool.hint.install: Tip: install the app for offline use (browser menu → Install app).
tool.card.how.title: How it works
tool.card.how.body: Amnesia Pass Generator is deterministic: always enter the same keyword and the same salt and the same password will be recreated — no database, no cloud.
tool.card.how.step1: Enter the keyword and, optionally, a per-service salt.
tool.card.how.step2: The system generates a SHA512 hash of the input.
tool.card.how.step3: The process repeats for the defined number of iterations.
tool.card.how.step4: The result is truncated to the desired number of characters.
tool.card.how.step5: Prefix and suffix are appended to the final result.
tool.card.profiles.title: Saved Profiles
tool.card.profiles.body: Save your settings to reuse them without retyping everything. Each profile is encrypted with AES-GCM-256 using your own keyword — no sensitive data is stored in plain text.
tool.card.profiles.step1: Fill in the fields and click Save Current Profile.
tool.card.profiles.step2: Give the profile a name (e.g.: GitHub, Bank).
tool.card.profiles.step3: To use it, select the profile from the dropdown and click Load.
tool.card.profiles.step4: Enter your keyword in the modal — all fields are restored.
tool.card.profiles.export.title: Export and Import
tool.card.profiles.export.body: Use Export to download a .json file with your encrypted profiles and Import to restore them on another device. The exported file contains no information in plain text.
tool.card.security.title: Security & Privacy
tool.card.security.body: All processing is done exclusively in your browser. No information is sent to external servers.
tool.card.security.warning.title: Iterations Warning
tool.card.security.warning.body: Excessively high values (e.g.: millions) can cause slowness or temporary freezing. For common use, values from 1 to 1000 are instantaneous.
tool.card.tip.title: Usage Tip
tool.card.tip.body: Use prefix and suffix to add special characters and uppercase letters without changing the base hash.
tool.card.tip.footer: Use a strong master seed (long passphrase) and a different salt for each service.
tool.modal.save.title: Save Profile
tool.modal.save.description: Give a name to identify this configuration. The Keyword is not stored — it will only be used to encrypt the other fields.
tool.modal.save.label: Profile Name
tool.modal.load.title: Load Profile
tool.modal.load.description: Enter the Keyword used when saving this profile to decrypt it.
tool.modal.load.label: Keyword
